title: rubus timbal-lagravei var. rudiformis
intro: Rubus timbal-lagravei var. rudiformis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan Mountains. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antidiarrheal, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Rubus timbal-lagravei var. rudiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
